heroHeadline: UNSC Debates Gaza Ceasefire Phase 2 as WHO Suspends Medical Evacuations
heroSubtitle: The UN Security Council held an open debate on April 8, 2026 focused on consolidating the Gaza ceasefire and advancing Phase 2 of the Trump administration's 20-point peace plan. The session came as the WHO kept medical evacuations from Gaza suspended following the killing of its driver by Israeli forces on April 6, leaving 18,000+ patients unable to access care. Israeli airstrikes also killed at least 10 at Maghazi refugee camp on April 7 after an Israeli-backed militia raid.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, UNRWA, Yesh Din, Human Rights Watch, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
